payload.label: cabinet
payload.long_description: Tall dark brown wooden cabinet with vertical recessed door panels and matte finish occupying the left two-thirds of the crop; top and right edges are partially cropped and an adjacent blue-gray wall is visible at the right; appears close to camera (approximately 1.5 m away).
